intended_use: Overjet Charting Assist is a Medical Image Management and Processing System (MIMPS) intended to detect natural dental structures including detection of tooth anatomy (enamel, pulp), and tooth numberin
intended_use_full: Overjet Charting Assist is a Medical Image Management and Processing System (MIMPS) intended to detect natural dental structures including detection of tooth anatomy (enamel, pulp), and tooth numbering, as well as dental structures added through past restorative treatments: implants, crowns, endodontic treatment (previous root canal treatment), fillings. The device is intended to assist dental professionals in producing dental charts based on image analysis.
target_condition: Detection of dental structures on radiographic images
